sub_manga_look-back-a136807_2021.title: ルックバック
sub_manga_look-back-a136807_2021.description:
Fujino is a fourth grader who draws a manga strip for the school newspaper. Her art makes her the star of the class, but one day she's told that Kyomoto, a student who refuses to come to school, would also like to submit a manga for the paper...

(Source: MANGA Plus)
Note: The one-shot was compiled in a special volume, released on September 3, 2021.

sub_manga_level-up-motaneun-player-a1305.title: 레벨업 못하는 플레이어
sub_manga_level-up-motaneun-player-a1305.description:
When Kim Kigyu received his invitation to become a player (a unique-ability player, at that), he thought his struggles were over. But no matter how hard he tries, he just can’t seem to get past level 1! After five years of working as a guide on the lower floors of the tower, he’s finally discovered his ability to link with “Egos” and raise his stats. As his new skills unlock adventures in unexplored gates, Kigyu gets his chance to defy expectations and show the world that rank isn’t everything.
(Source: Tapas)

sub_manga_liar-game-a31649_2005.title: LIAR GAME
sub_manga_liar-game-a31649_2005.description: Wishing she would live up to the ideal, Kanzaki Nao's father named her thusly for “honesty”. Nao has more than lived up to her father's wishes--even exceeding them and earning the label of "a foolishly honest girl". This makes Nao the least qualified candidate for the high stakes 'Liar Game', where winning requires deceiving the opponent out of their money and losing means receiving massive debt. However, that doesn't stop a box containing a hundred million yen in cash and a card informing her of her participation in the game from arriving at her doorstep, nor does it stop her from being promptly tricked out of the entire sum of money. Upon hearing that a genius swindler, responsible for the bankruptcy of a major corporation, is being released from jail, Nao goes to the swindler, Shinichi Akiyama, to enlist his help. With that, the two are drawn into the dark, greed-filled, and deceptive world of the Liar Game.

sub_manga_last-game-a60315_2011.title: ラストゲーム
sub_manga_last-game-a60315_2011.description:
In elementary school, the rich and spoiled Yanagi Naoto was known for excelling in both studies and sports. But then he suffered the first setback of his life when Kujou Mikoto, a girl from a poor family, transferred to his school and performed better than Naoto at every turn. Reeling from this unforgivable blow to his pride, Naoto decided that he had to make Mikoto lose at something…by making her lose her heart to him, which he could then break! Now that they’re both in college, will Naoto finally be able to win Mikoto’s affections–or will he lose this final game with her?

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

Notes: The chapter count includes 6 extra stories and 4 one-shots.

sub_manga_login-murim-a120385_2020.title: 로그인 무림
sub_manga_login-murim-a120385_2020.description:
When an interdimensional portal appeared and released countless monsters across the world, humanity didn’t take the threat lying down. Mankind fought back, defeating the monsters' Demon King and creating a new way of life as "hunters." But when Taekyung Jin, a struggling, low-ranked hunter, accidentally logs into a game on a beat-up VR console, he finds himself trapped in an all-new world, unable to log out.

(Source: Tapas)

sub_manga_lv2-kara-cheat-datta-moto-yuus.title: Lv2からチートだった元勇者候補のまったり異世界ライフ
sub_manga_lv2-kara-cheat-datta-moto-yuus.description:
Banaza, a humble merchant, is summoned to another world as a hero candidate, in the hopes that he has what it takes to defeat the demon army. When his summoners discover that he possesses no special skills, Banaza is summarily dismissed…but something goes wrong, and he can’t go back home. Now he must find a way to survive in this new kingdom. Luckily, Banaza might be more powerful than anyone–including Banaza himself–realized!

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

sub_manga_lonely-girl-ni-sakaraenai-a112.title: ロンリーガールに逆らえない
sub_manga_lonely-girl-ni-sakaraenai-a112.description:
In this juicy yuri manga, the goody-goody high school girl Sakurai meets a lonely girl—and ends up entangled in a web of blackmail that might just lead to romance. It's hard to keep up with school when you can never say no to a devious classmate!

(Source: Kodansha USA)

Note: Chapter count includes five extra chapters.

sub_manga_lovely-complex-a30031_2001.title: ラブ★コン
sub_manga_lovely-complex-a30031_2001.description:
Rather than bow to the inevitable, Risa and Atsushi join forces to pursue their true objects of affection. But will their budding friendship become something more complex?

(Source: VIZ Media)

Note: - Includes the one-shot "Hoshi ni Nattemo Aishiteru" 
- Includes the one-shot "Bokura no Ibasho".

sub_manga_love-bullet-a171729_2023.title: ラブ・バレット
sub_manga_love-bullet-a171729_2023.description:
In this contemporary world, Cupids solve problems of love not with bows and arrows but with guns! However, when the Cupids get in an argument over how to solve a love triangle…a full on shoot-out occurs?!

(Source: Yen Press)
